components.title: compliant-s3
components.description: Reusable Terraform pattern for an AWS S3 primary bucket plus a dedicated access-log bucket. Hardcodes server-side encryption, versioning, public access block, access logging, and required compliance tags.
components.purpose: Provide a compliant-by-default S3 primitive that any team can adopt with three lines of consumer Terraform.

control-implementations.description: Implementation of NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls satisfied by this module.

implemented-requirements.description: AES-256 server-side encryption is enforced via aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration. Hardcoded; consumers cannot override.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing terraform plan.json.

implemented-requirements.description: Public access is explicitly blocked via aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block with all four flags set to true. Uniform bucket-level access enforced.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing conftest-results.json showing AC-3 passing.

implemented-requirements.description: Access logging is enabled via aws_s3_bucket_logging, routing logs to a dedicated log bucket. Log bucket has separate encryption and public access controls.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing terraform plan.json showing logging configuration.

implemented-requirements.description: Required compliance tags enforced via provider default_tags: Project, Environment, ManagedBy, ComplianceScope. Versioning enabled preserving object states for audit.

links.text: Signed pipeline bundle containing conftest-results.json showing CM-6 passing.
